mapper.select: SELECT id, perm_name, perm_code, parent_id, status, create_time, update_time FROM sys_permission WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT DISTINCT p.id, p.perm_name, p.perm_code, p.parent_id, p.status, p.create_time, p.update_time FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON ur.role_id = rp.role_id LEFT JOIN sys_permission p ON rp.perm_id = p.id WHERE u.id = #{userId} AND p.id IS NOT NULL AND p.status = 1
SELECT id, perm_name, perm_code, parent_id, status, create_time, update_time FROM sys_permission WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY parent_id ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, perm_name, perm_code, parent_id, status, create_time, update_time FROM sys_permission WHERE status = 1 AND perm_code LIKE '%:menu' ORDER BY parent_id ASC, id ASC
